## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Biologica's content strategy, workflow updates, and image generation for website launch.](https://fathom.video/share/Hy8NvfiquxawH3VoouJ2us6WhVimv174?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content progress is good; focus shifting to strategy and selection](https://fathom.video/share/Hy8NvfiquxawH3VoouJ2us6WhVimv174?tab=summary&timestamp=94.0)
  - [Dev team updating workflow/knowledge base; full content ramp-up to start next week](https://fathom.video/share/Hy8NvfiquxawH3VoouJ2us6WhVimv174?tab=summary&timestamp=341.0)
  - [Plan: complete written content 4-6 weeks before 9/24, then focus on image/video generation](https://fathom.video/share/Hy8NvfiquxawH3VoouJ2us6WhVimv174?tab=summary&timestamp=1088.0)
  - [Brian using AI tools (Claude) to assist with various content needs beyond articles](https://fathom.video/share/Hy8NvfiquxawH3VoouJ2us6WhVimv174?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy and Progress

  - [Founding story in progress; PR person reviewing](https://fathom.video/share/Hy8NvfiquxawH3VoouJ2us6WhVimv174?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)
  - [Content generation progressing well, focus shifting to selection and strategy](https://fathom.video/share/Hy8NvfiquxawH3VoouJ2us6WhVimv174?tab=summary&timestamp=102.0)
  - [Prioritizing topics relevant to target audience for new website launch](https://fathom.video/share/Hy8NvfiquxawH3VoouJ2us6WhVimv174?tab=summary&timestamp=191.0)
  - [Ensuring depth across all topics, including trademarked ingredients](https://fathom.video/share/Hy8NvfiquxawH3VoouJ2us6WhVimv174?tab=summary&timestamp=262.0)
  - [Planning to add more assignments, including ingredient-based content](https://fathom.video/share/Hy8NvfiquxawH3VoouJ2us6WhVimv174?tab=summary&timestamp=242.0)

### Workflow and Knowledge Base Updates

### Content Review Process

  - [Plan: prioritize written content, then shift to image/video generation](https://fathom.video/share/Hy8NvfiquxawH3VoouJ2us6WhVimv174?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Timeline: complete content 4-6 weeks before 9/24, leaving ample time for visual assets](https://fathom.video/share/Hy8NvfiquxawH3VoouJ2us6WhVimv174?tab=summary&timestamp=1088.0)
  - [GrowthX adding design resources to support image/video creation](https://fathom.video/share/Hy8NvfiquxawH3VoouJ2us6WhVimv174?tab=summary&timestamp=1153.0)
